name: Isla de la Muerte
short_description: Isla de la Muerte is an intense survival game filled with mystery and danger. Stranded on a remote island, you uncover the aftermath of a secret government experiment gone horribly wrong. Officially erased from records, the island is now overrun by hordes of relentless zombies.
detailed_description:
Isla de la Muerte is a survival game where you must stay alive on a dangerous island overrun by zombies.

- Survive the island: Manage hunger, thirst, and health while looting houses for supplies.

- Explore & stay alert: Search the forest and river, but beware—zombies lurk near buildings and attack on sight.

- Build & shelter: Construct your own base to stay safe from the undead.

- Hunt & gather: Hunt animals, fish in the river, and gather resources to survive.

- Craft & defend: Make weapons, traps, and barricades to fight off zombies.

- Day & night challenge: Darkness brings more danger—prepare wisely!
